task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Strasbourg_RX' ground station was created with the correct coordinates and altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Ground Stations' list or 'Edit Ground Station' dialog box in GPredict showing the name 'Strasbourg_RX', Latitude '48.5839', Longitude '7.7455', and Altitude '140'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Strasbourg_RX' is set as the default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window under 'Ground Stations' showing 'Strasbourg_RX' selected as the default, or a visual indicator (like a checkmark or bold text) next to it in the ground station list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the global minimum pass elevation is updated to 25 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window (typically under 'Modules' -> 'Passes' or similar) showing the 'Minimum elevation' field set to '25'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a tracking module named 'High_RCS_Targets' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab, window title, or module configuration dialog within the GPredict main interface clearly named 'High_RCS_Targets'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'High_RCS_Targets' module uses a multi-pane 'Map, Table, and Polar' layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'High_RCS_Targets' module window and ensure it is divided into three distinct sections: a world map (Map), a tabular list of satellites (Table), and a circular radar-like view (Polar).

task_completion.description: Verify that the required satellites are added to the 'High_RCS_Targets' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the table pane or map pane within the 'High_RCS_Targets' module. It must explicitly list or show tracking data for 'ISS (ZARYA)', 'CSS (TIANHE)', 'METOP-B', and 'METOP-C'.

integrity.description: Verify that the GPredict graphical user interface was used to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application windows, menus, and dialogs should be clearly visible in the screenshots, showing genuine interaction with the software.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply type the requirements into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes (coordinates, elevation, module names) must be visible within actual GPredict UI elements, not in a text file, terminal echo, or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify that the satellites are genuinely loaded into the tracking module.
integrity.visual_evidence: The satellites in the module should display dynamic tracking data (like azimuth, elevation, or map positions) typical of GPredict, rather than static mock text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Strasbourg_RX coordinates: 48.5839 N, 7.7455 E, altitude 140m. Minimum pass elevation: 25 degrees. Target module name: 'High_RCS_Targets'. Required satellites in the module: ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), METOP-B (NORAD 38771), and METOP-C (NORAD 43689).
